_meta.title: Codex Desktop GUI Compatibility
_meta.confidence_note: HIGH = confirmed in official docs; MED = inferred from multiple sources; LOW = no evidence found

primitives_found.name: tool/requestUserInput
primitives_found.description: App Server experimental method. Prompts user with 1-3 short questions. Each question supports multiple-choice options and an isOther free-form field. Rendered as tab-navigable overlay in the Desktop TUI input area.
primitives_found.access_from_plugin: indirect — skill/hook script must connect to running App Server stdio and call JSON-RPC method tool/requestUserInput

primitives_found.name: slash_command_popup
primitives_found.description: Typing / in the Desktop input opens a filtered popup listing all available slash commands including installed plugin skills. Plugin skills appear under their skill name as defined in SKILL.md frontmatter.
primitives_found.access_from_plugin: automatic — skills installed via plugin appear in popup

primitives_found.name: model_picker
primitives_found.description: /model command opens a model popup backed by the model/list App Server API. The hidden field on model entries controls visibility in the picker.
primitives_found.access_from_plugin: no plugin hook; read-only via App Server model/list

primitives_found.name: personality_picker
primitives_found.description: /personality command opens a style picker (friendly, pragmatic, none). Plugin cannot hook into this.

primitives_found.name: permission_request_dialog
primitives_found.description: PermissionRequest lifecycle hook fires before Codex executes a potentially risky tool call. Desktop renders a native approval dialog. Plugins can intercept via PermissionRequest hook in hooks.json.
primitives_found.access_from_plugin: YES — via PermissionRequest hook event in hooks.json

primitives_found.name: plugin_browser_sidebar
primitives_found.description: Desktop /plugins command opens a tabbed browser with installed plugins, marketplace sources, enable/disable toggles, and remote/local/git source options. Plugins cannot inject UI into this sidebar.
primitives_found.access_from_plugin: none (read-only discovery; install/uninstall via App Server plugin/install and plugin/uninstall)

primitives_found.name: summary_pane
primitives_found.description: Desktop shows a task sidebar with plans, sources, generated artifacts, and summaries while Codex works. No plugin write API exists to push content into this pane.

primitives_found.name: featured_plugin_ids
primitives_found.description: The plugin/list App Server method returns featured_plugin_ids, which populate the Featured section in the Desktop plugin browser. No self-serve nomination process documented as of 2026-04.
primitives_found.access_from_plugin: none (editorial placement by OpenAI or community marketplace curator)

primitives_found.name: in_app_browser
primitives_found.description: Atlas-backed in-app browser for local dev server previews. No plugin API to open URLs inside it.

primitives_found.name: status_bar
primitives_found.description: No plugin status bar API. TUI shows session progress only. Plugins can print status text to stdout during skill execution.

adapter_changes_needed.change: Add composerIcon, logo, screenshots, privacyPolicyURL, termsOfServiceURL fields to interface object
adapter_changes_needed.rationale: Required for full marketplace listing and Featured eligibility

adapter_changes_needed.change: Add --remap-precompact flag: when set, translate PreCompact -> SessionEnd with a verbose warning about semantic difference
adapter_changes_needed.rationale: SessionEnd is the closest Desktop analog to PreCompact; opt-in reduces silent drops

adapter_changes_needed.change: Add PermissionRequest hook handler that logs requests and auto-approves read-only tool calls
adapter_changes_needed.rationale: Desktop exposes PermissionRequest natively; using it for /ccc-review scope gating improves security UX

adapter_changes_needed.change: Change defaultPrompt from /ccc to /ccc-start for first-run onboarding UX
adapter_changes_needed.rationale: Better first-run discovery on Codex Desktop where users may not know /ccc

adapter_changes_needed.change: Bridge script: connects to App Server stdio, calls tool/requestUserInput, returns answers as JSON. Enables chip-picker UX from skill hook scripts.
adapter_changes_needed.rationale: Provides AskUserQuestion parity on Codex Desktop. Skip for v4.2 — SKILL.md text prompt achieves same UX at zero cost.

official_openai_marketplace.process: No public submission process as of 2026-04. Editorial curation by OpenAI. Contact OpenAI developer relations.

community_marketplace_codex_marketplace_.featured_criteria: Editorial selection based on install count, plugin quality, asset completeness, and privacyPolicyURL presence

github_based_install.description: Any GitHub repo with .codex-plugin/plugin.json is installable directly. No approval needed.

illustrative_skills_with_gui_bindings.binding: defaultPrompt in manifest interface pre-fills composer with /ccc-build; skill text presents project-type choices as numbered list (AskUserQuestion parity via text)
PermissionRequest hook fires before git diff / file reads; permission-gate.js auto-approves read-only, prompts user for destructive operations
SessionStart hook detects CODEX_WORKTREE env var; if in worktree, auto-scopes fleet dispatch to worktree root and logs worktree name in output

research_gaps: No official Featured placement process documented — may require direct OpenAI developer relations contact
ask-bridge.js pattern not validated against actual App Server — needs smoke test before implementation
PermissionRequest hook payload schema not confirmed — needs test against real Codex Desktop v26.415+
Desktop worktree env var name (CODEX_WORKTREE) inferred, not confirmed in docs
